zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Newmarch於從1237年到1273年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Adam Newmarch71歲，母親Mrs. Adam de Newmarch67歲。她於1281年與Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot在英國英格蘭越可爾分維其可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1330年4月18日在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Newmarch于从1237年到1273年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Adam Newmarch71岁，母亲Mrs. Adam de Newmarch67岁。她于1281年与Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot在英国英格兰越可爾分維其可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1330年4月18日在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Newmarch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Neufmarché (Seine-Maritime). See   Anglo-Norman Families  .

variants.name: Newmark
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Chayim, Meyer, Shlomo, Vigdor.
Americanized form of Scandinavian Nymark: habitational name from farms named with ny ‘new’ + mark ‘field’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Neumark  .

variants.name: Anglo-Norman Families
meanings: 2  Norman, English: locative name from Martinvast (in Manche, France). See   Anglo-Norman Families  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Newmarch was born from 1237 to 1273, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Adam Newmarch, was 71 and her mother, Mrs. Adam de Newmarch, was 67. She married Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot in 1281, in Fenwick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 18 April 1330, in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Newmarch est née du 1237 au 1273, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Adam Newmarch, avait 71 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Adam de Newmarch, avait 67 ans. Elle a épousé Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot en 1281, à Fenwick, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 avril 1330, à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Newmarch von 1237 bis 1273 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam Newmarch 71 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Adam de Newmarch 67. Sie hat 1281 in Fenwick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. April 1330 in Norfolk, England.

Lei sposato Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot nel 1281, nel Fenwick, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 aprile 1330, nel Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Newmarchがから1237年まで1273年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Adam Newmarchは71歳，母Mrs. Adam de Newmarchは67歳であった。1281年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアフエンウィックでJordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1330年4月18日にイギリスノーフォルクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Newmarch(이)가 1237년 부터 1273년 까지 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam Newmarch(은)는 71세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Adam de Newmarch(은)는 67세였다. 그녀는 1281년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 펜윅에서 Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1330년 4월 18일 영국 노르폴크에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot em 1281, em Fenwick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de abril de 1330, em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Newmarch родилась с 1237 по 1273 в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam Newmarch было 71 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Adam de Newmarch, 67. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jordan de Foliot ,1st baron of Foliot в 1281 г. в местности фенвикк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 апреля 1330 г. в местности норфолк, Англия.
